_comment: ADR-019: 7-1/4-1/2-1/1-1 are W1 MINIMAL placeholders (_placeholder:true) -- Wave W2 (Deepseek) authors the real scripts. 10-0/5-0/3-1/1-2/0-4 are reused unchanged from the pre-ADR-019 ladder.

beats.text: {captain} leads the side out and you can feel it — this team means business tonight.
The opener arrives inside six minutes! Early blood in the water.
Two! The press is suffocating them into mistake after mistake.
Goals four, five and six arrive in a frenzied nine-minute spell. This is turning into a massacre.
Six at the break. {gk} hasn't touched the ball in twenty minutes — it's academic now.
Eight. NINE. {topAtt} completes a hat-trick and just keeps going.
TEN. NIL. Final whistle. {captain} lifts his arms to the sky. Immortality, achieved.
{captain} strides out with the calm of a side that already knows how this ends.
{topAtt} finishes clinically — the lead is deserved and the pattern is set.
Wave after wave forward; {topMid} pulls the strings and the opposition can't get near it.
Three-nil at the break. Comfortable. Controlled. Ruthless.
Four, and it could be more. This is a stroll in the sunshine.
FIVE-NIL. {gk} barely broke a sweat. A dominant display from first whistle to last.
{captain} sets the tone early — professional, composed, in control.
{topAtt} opens the scoring. Textbook stuff.
Two-nil, and it looks routine — until it doesn't.
{weakest} switches off for a second and gifts them a way back into it. 2-1. Nerves, briefly.
A last-ditch challenge from {topDef} snuffs out real danger at the other end.
Composure restored. Three-one, and the game is put back to bed.
Full time: 3-1. A professional win with one uncomfortable wobble.
{captain} strides out with the cold stare of a side that came to make an example.
{topAtt} opens the account — a finish so precise it barely makes a sound.
Two-nil. {topMid} pulls the strings, the net bulges again. The pattern is set.
Against the run of play they pull one back. {weakest} caught napping — a flicker of doubt.
Extinguished. {topAtt} pounces immediately — three-one, the wobble lasted four minutes.
Three-one at the break and it should be six. The floodlights catch the mist — a dismantling in progress.
Fourth, fifth, sixth, seventh — the avalanche resumes. {topAtt} has his hat-trick and keeps going.
Full time: 7-1. Total demolition. {gk} barely broke a sweat beyond the lone goal. Ruthless.
{captain} leads out a purposeful side — the calm before controlled aggression.
{topAtt} sweeps home the opener. One-nil, shape is right, rhythm is building.
{topMid} doubles the lead with a curling effort — this is starting to look comfortable.
A moment of slumber. {weakest} is caught ball-watching and they punish it. Two-one. The door cracks open.
Two-one at the break. That sucker punch has given them a foothold. The dressing room will be tense.
{gk} springs low to his left — a sharp stop that keeps the lead intact. The warning is heard.
{topAtt} snuffs out the hope. Three-one. The killer instinct returns just in time.
Full time: 4-1. Emphatic, controlled, one wobble weathered. A professional's win.
{captain} rallies the side in the tunnel — this one is going to be a street fight.
{topAtt} pounces on the rebound — scrappy, hungry, a lead forged from pure will.
{topMid} slides a pass through but the chance goes begging. The margin feels fragile.
They're level. {weakest} sold short by a bounce — one-each and the momentum has shifted.
All square at the break. This could go either way and everyone in the stadium knows it.
{topDef} rises highest from a set piece — two-one and the bench empties in raw celebration.
{gk} spills one and scrambles to recover — chaos in the box, hearts in every throat.
Full time: 2-1. A grind, a scrap, a victory earned in the dirt. {captain} sinks to his knees, spent.
{captain} leads out the side with measured strides — respect for the occasion and the threat.
{topMid} slips a delicate ball through but the final touch won't come. A sign of life.
They break the deadlock. {gk} gets a strong hand to it but can't keep it out. One-down and rattled.
{topAtt} latches onto a loose ball — scrappy, vital, level. The roar is raw relief.
One apiece at the break. Honest, hard, too close to call. {captain} gestures for calm.
{gk} at full stretch — a fingertip save that keeps the scores level. The crowd exhales as one.
{weakest} is being targeted now. Every long ball is aimed his way — he's holding on, but barely.
Full time: 1-1. A nervy draw, honours even, {gk} drained by the tension. Could have gone either way — and that is the truth.
{captain} leads out the underdogs — write them off at your peril, they say.
{gk} produces an early stop that has no business being that good.
Behind, against the run of play. Harsh, but the scoreboard doesn't care.
One-nil down at the break, but this team hasn't stopped believing.
Level! Against all odds — the equalizer arrives and the bench erupts.
{gk} is beaten by a strike he had no chance with. Cruel, so late, so cruel.
Full time: 1-2. Heroics from {gk} weren't enough. Heads held high in defeat.
{captain} leads the side out, unaware of the horror about to unfold.
Conceded early. {weakest} caught flat-footed, and the damage is done inside a quarter hour.
Two-nil, and the wheels are visibly coming off.
Two down at the break. Heads down, body language wrecked.
{weakest} loses the ball in his own box — three-nil, and it's unraveling fast.
Four. FOUR. This has stopped being a football match and started being an ordeal.
Full time: 0-4. Total collapse. {captain} trudges off, shattered, staring at nothing.
